title: cakile maritima subsp. aegyptia
intro: Cakile maritima subsp. aegyptia, also known as Egyptian sea rocket or Egyptian sea rocket cress, is a subspecies of the annual or biennial flowering plant Cakile maritima. It is a member of the Brassicaceae family, commonly used for its medicinal properties and health benefits. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues, skin problems, and digestive issues. Cakile maritima subsp. aegyptia is commonly prepared as an infusion or decoction for medicinal use, and it can also be used in the form of a tincture or applied topically as a cream or ointment.
